synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-21842 Important: Oracle Linux 9 thunderbird security update

full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-21842

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-21842.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
thunderbird-140.5.0-1.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
thunderbird-140.5.0-1.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/thunderbird-140.5.0-1.0.1.el9_7.src.rpm
